title: Assessment of Soil Physicochemical Changes, Bioaccumulation of Potentially Toxic Elements, and Okra Growth Parameters Under Different Irrigation Systems with Treated Wastewater
description: SpeakForWater Episode 29: Assessment of Soil Physicochemical Changes, Bioaccumulation of Potentially Toxic Elements, and Okra Growth Parameters Under Different Irrigation Systems with Treated Wastewater. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
